archives.name: arch-review-2026-06-01.md
archives.content:
# ARCHIVE
summary_by: SummarizerAgent
archive_mode: fake

## 关键决策
- architecture review concluded: keep monolith for V1, microservices later
- chose monolith because team is small (3 devs)
- microservices would add deployment complexity without proportional benefit
- decision reviewed by tech lead and approved

## 后续建议
- revisit microservices when team grows to 8+ devs
